events.address: Stratos Bar & Grill 2907 W Northwest Hwy Dallas TX 75220 USA
events.description:
Stratos Bar & Grill is a legendary Latin dance venue in Dallas hosting weekly salsa and bachata socials every Wednesday night. The evening begins with a complimentary dance class led by rotating guest instructors, followed by social dancing until 2:00 AM.

The venue offers drink specials, a kitchen open all night, free parking, and no cover charge. It's a great midweek outing for dancers of all levels in a vibrant and welcoming atmosphere.

events.title: Salsa Wednesdays at Vidorra Dallas
events.address: Vidorra Cocina 2642 Main St Dallas, TX 75226 United States
events.description:
Salsa Wednesdays at Vidorra Dallas is a vibrant weekly Latin dance event held every Wednesday evening at Vidorra Cocina in the heart of Deep Ellum. 

The night kicks off at 7:00 PM with a free beginner-friendly salsa lesson, providing an inviting atmosphere for newcomers and seasoned dancers alike. DJ Wander keeps the energy high from 7:00 PM to 11:00 PM, spinning a dynamic mix of salsa, bachata, merengue, and more. 

Guests can enjoy Vidorra's signature margaritas and authentic Mexican cuisine while dancing the night away. 

The event is free to attend, making it a popular midweek destination for Latin dance enthusiasts in Dallas.

events.title: Salsa Saturdays at Blue Mesa Grill
events.address: Blue Mesa Grill 14866 Montfort Dr Dallas, TX 75254 United States
events.description:
Salsa Saturdays at Blue Mesa Grill in Addison, Texas, offer a vibrant weekly Latin dance experience. Every Saturday night, guests can enjoy a free salsa class followed by a lively social dance party featuring a mix of Salsa, Bachata, Merengue, and more. 

The event runs from 10:00 PM to 3:00 AM, providing ample time for dancing and socializing. Attendees are encouraged to dress in casual nice attire, and free parking is available on-site. The venue also offers drink specials throughout the night, enhancing the festive atmosphere. 

With a cover charge of $8, Salsa Saturdays provide an accessible and exciting opportunity for both novice and experienced dancers to immerse themselves in Latin rhythms and culture.

events.title: Gloria’s Nightlife
events.address: Gloria's Latin Cuisine 5100 Belt Line Rd, Suite #864 Addison, TX 75254 United States
events.description:
Gloria's Nightlife in Addison, Texas, transforms the dining experience into a vibrant Latin dance party every Saturday night. Starting at 11:00 PM, guests can enjoy live Latin music from Havana NRG and dynamic DJ sets by DJ Insanity, keeping the energy high until 2:00 AM. The venue enforces a smart, upscale dress code, ensuring an elegant atmosphere for all attendees. 

With no cover charge, it's an accessible and exciting opportunity for both novice and experienced dancers to immerse themselves in Latin rhythms and culture. For those seeking an elevated experience, VIP Table & Bottle Service is available, with a special offer of $100 off for a limited time. Whether you're celebrating a special occasion or simply looking for a lively night out, Gloria's Nightlife offers an unforgettable evening of music, dancing, and Latin flair.

events.title: Vitruvian Salsa Festival 2025
events.address: Vitruvian Park 3966 Vitruvian Way Addison, TX 75001 United States
events.description:
The Vitruvian Salsa Festival returns to Addison, Texas, for its 11th annual celebration of Latin music and dance. 

Held every second Saturday from June through September, the festival offers a vibrant evening of live salsa bands, DJ sets, dance lessons, and a variety of food trucks. Each event runs from 6:00 PM to 10:00 PM, with free salsa lessons starting at 6:30 PM, followed by live music at 7:00 PM. DJ Ruben Reyes keeps the energy high throughout the night. 

The 2025 lineup includes Havana NRG on June 14, Latin Swing on July 12, Zone D'Mambo on August 9, and Yamilka G & Orquesta on September 13. Admission is free, and parking is available for $15 (cash only) at designated lots. Attendees are encouraged to bring their dancing shoes and enjoy an unforgettable summer evening under the stars.

events.title: Fuego Sundays at Longhorn Icehouse
events.address: Longhorn Icehouse 1901 W Northwest Hwy Dallas TX 75220 USA
events.description:
Fuego Sundays is Dallas’s premier Sunday night Latin dance party hosted by David Herrera at Longhorn Icehouse. Each week, guests enjoy free salsa and bachata classes around 10:00 PM, followed by live dance performances, top DJs spinning salsa, mambo, merengue, bachata, and cumbia, and social dancing until 2:00 AM.

This event is known for its vibrant energy, dance shows by professional groups, food available until 1:00 AM, and $10 pre-pay cover options via DavidHerrera-ENT.com. It offers a welcoming environment for both new and experienced dancers to engage with DFW's Latin dance community.

events.title: Sabroso Sundays at Al-Amir Addison
events.address: Al-Amir Addison 3885 Belt Line Road Addison, TX 75001 United States
events.description:
Sabroso Sundays is a vibrant weekly Latin dance night held every Sunday at Al-Amir Addison in Texas. The event features a lively mix of Salsa, Bachata, Merengue, Reggaeton, and Latin hits, creating an energetic atmosphere for dance enthusiasts. Ladies aged 21 and over enjoy free admission all night, and free parking is available for all guests. 

The venue boasts a great dance floor and patio, enhancing the overall experience. DJ Christian Remix, along with guest DJs, provides the music that keeps the energy high throughout the night. The dress code is enforced from 5 PM to 2 AM, encouraging guests to dress to impress. 

Happy Hour specials are available all night, adding to the festive ambiance. 

Whether you're a seasoned dancer or a newcomer, Sabroso Sundays offers an exciting opportunity to immerse yourself in Latin rhythms and dance culture.

events.title: Salsa Sunday at Lola’s Cuban Food
events.address: Lola's Cuban Food 4608 Bryant Irvin Rd Suite 440 Fort Worth, TX 76132 United States
events.description:
Salsa Sunday at Lola’s Cuban Food is a welcoming weekly Latin dance afternoon in Fort Worth. Each Sunday starts with a free, beginner-friendly salsa class at 3:00 PM, inviting new dancers while giving regulars a chance to polish fundamentals. After the lesson, the floor opens for social dancing with a lively mix of salsa and other Caribbean rhythms in a relaxed, family-friendly setting.

On the last Sunday of the month, the energy steps up with live music from Javaos Band, bringing salsa, timba, merengue, bachata, cumbia, and more right after the class. When the band wraps, the evening rolls into open mic and karaoke, keeping the community vibe going until the end of the night. Hosted by Salsa Squad – Salsa at the Gardens, this weekly gathering offers an easy, low-pressure way to connect through music and dance.

Schedule: Free salsa class at 3:00 PM; social dancing until 6:00 PM. Live band on the last Sunday, followed by open mic and karaoke.

Cost: Free admission.

Venue: Lola’s Cuban Food, Fort Worth.

Class starts with 15 minutes of salsa styling and footwork / solo dancing for men and women
Then 30 minutes of salsa partner work with combinations etc
Then the last 45 minutes of class is bachata Everything is taught for 2 weeks .
Then we move on to something new . A old fashioned / salsa congress / WORKSHOP style of teaching .
See results in as little as 1 month.
\*\*\*
Come learn some styling , footwork, new combinations & have fun.
\*\*\*
(LOS ANGELES STYLE SALSA) " Is a combination of everything from tango,swing , afro cuban and ballroom infused into salsa dancing .
It is known to be a flashy , clean, show /entertaining cabaret style, with great musicality ,tricks , footwork and styling "
\*\*\*
It is one of the two most popular styles in the world,now almost 30 years old.
\*\*\*
As far as Davids bachata it is a FUSION OF AMERICAN & ARGENTINE STYLES OF TANGO INTO BACHATA WITH ALSO THE FOOTWORK AND BODY MOVEMENT OF THE DOMINICAN STYLE.
While not leaving out the modern , urban and romantic styles of bachata .
\*\*\*
My goal,vision and purpose is to impact , instruct , influence and educate individuals & community in a positive way culturally through the art of dance , media , events , classes and competitions .
\*\*\*
Ladies wear comfortable non rubber sole shoes and no street heels .
Until you get latin dance shoes. Men wear non rubber sole shoes .
Till you are ready for dance shoes.
\*\*\*
DANCING IS A "ART" ,LEARNING HOW TO CONTROL YOUR BODY AND INTERPRET / EXPRESS THE MUSIC. ANYONE CAN DANCE IT JUST DEPENDS HOW BAD YOU WANT TO AND HOW MUCH YOU
PRACTICE
